title: Java Full Stack Developer
candidate_text: Java full stack developer with 3+ years of experience in backend and frontend development. Worked with Spring Boot, Spring Security, MySQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, JavaScript, HTML and CSS.

title: Software Developer
